operation.label: Trigger activation
operation.description: Activate a trigger and patch all affected downstream dependencies.

affected_closure.label: Rights and legitimacy exposure require human review gates before live release.
Block live deployment and return the policy for model evidence, rights/appeal evidence, and review-log proof.
rights and public-policy release gate for high-risk public-sector AI deployment
Gate escalation or stakeholder objection shows the proposed review design lacks meaningful contestability.
Do not release the AI-assisted decision process. Return it for an Audit-mode evidence pass, rights and legitimacy review, named human gates, and recorded review-log decisions.

required_approvals.reviewer: A1 public agency decision owner with A2 technical reviewer and A3 affected-party representation

approve test-only evaluation, block release, or require additional measurement evidence

changed_decision_meaning: Trigger activation changes T1:trigger; 18 downstream object(s) are in closure, so the current decision rendering must be regenerated. human review blocks release.
